hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' && { STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- '*.py'); [ -n "$STAGED" ] && { echo "$STAGED" | xargs ruff check --fix --quiet 2>/dev/null; echo "$STAGED" | xargs ruff format --quiet 2>/dev/null; echo "$STAGED" | xargs git add 2>/dev/null; }; true; } || true
